agent_sizing_criteria.S: 1-2 tools, single responsibility, no branching decisions
agent_sizing_criteria.M: 3-5 tools, some conditional logic or external calls
agent_sizing_criteria.L: 6+ tools, complex decision trees, multiple integrations, or HITL

integration_sizing_criteria.S: Read-only, standard REST/SDK, no auth complexity
integration_sizing_criteria.M: Read-write, OAuth or API key, moderate field mapping
integration_sizing_criteria.L: Bidirectional, complex auth, webhooks, or custom protocol
